name: aksh21h-portfolio-secret-code
description: Are you a magician? Because whenever I look at this code, everyone else disappears.

scripts.dev: echo 'Did it hurt when you fell from heaven to steal my code?'
scripts.build: echo 'If you were a transforming variable, you'd be a fine-apple.'
scripts.start: echo 'Are you a parking ticket? Because you have FINE written all over you.'

author: Akshdeep Singh
